metadata.name: Request a Copy of a Pay Stub

description: An employee needs a copy of a pay stub from six months ago.

nodes.task_description: Guide the employee to the payroll self-service portal where they can access all their past pay stubs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides instructions for the employee to retrieve the document themselves.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the employee was able to find and download the correct pay stub.

expected_outcome.expected: Employee confirms they have the document they need.
